game_start.title: Welcome to Universe Market Builder
game_start.intro: In the vast expanse of space, opportunity awaits those bold enough to seize it.
game_start.backstory:
Your aunt has died. This is not a crushing blow, it's not like you were close – you hadn't seen her in 20 years, maybe more. You weren't surprised when she didn't come to your parents funeral after the falling out she'd had with your mother (her sister). 
The big surprised was that you are her sole beneficiary. You get everything.
"It's not much, as these things go." The lawyer told you this morning. "She owned 51% of {corporationName}, so you now have the controlling interest. {corporationName} just owns a farming planet, and this cargo hauler. You can use that to move goods directly, but I suggest you negotiate trade routes – that's what I'd do. Your aunt never listened to me, which is why there are no routes setup today and only the two assets. She had to sell off everything else. They way she ran things, we'd have probably had a revolution in a year or two. The people are not happy."
Now it's yours. Setup trade routes, build structures, buy stations and planets, anything to build your holdings. Just know that others are other there too, and they want to corner the market when possible. With no interstellar government to regulate trade by force it can get dicey quick. The only meaningful regulations are the corporate interests that keep everyone engaged in the stock market.
game_start.goal: Your goal: build an corporate empire across the stars through trade, exploration, and strategic expansion.
game_start.closing: The universe is yours to explore. Chart your own course to success.

tutorial.title: Getting Started
tutorial.navigation: Use the Navigation buttons to jump between connected systems.
tutorial.docking: Dock at stations or land on planets to access local markets.
tutorial.energy: Monitor your ship's energy - each jump consumes fuel.
tutorial.corporation: Build your corporation's value by acquiring assets and trading goods.

ui.help_prompt: Type a command and press Enter to interact with the game.

jump_planner.sequence_complete: Jump sequence complete. Arrived at destination: System {destinationId}

commands.unknown: Unknown command: {command}. Try typing a button label, a shortcut like L/D/J/S, or a system number.
commands.takeoff_required: You cannot plot a jump route while docked or landed. Take off first.
commands.route_confirm_prompt: Plot route to System {destinationId} ({jumps} jumps, {cost} ticks) and start jump sequence?

settings.not_implemented: Game Settings feature is not yet implemented.
